intro_text: p_l didn't plan to have other cats with {PRONOUN/p_l/object}, but {PRONOUN/p_l/subject}{VERB/p_l/'re/'s} grateful for the help anyway, especially with the amount of blooming plants. That is, until r_c starts sneezing. Clearly, the pollen from the trees is affecting {PRONOUN/r_c/object} somewhat.
decline_text: Since r_c isn't up for a patrol in a pollen-filled forest, the patrol returns to camp with no new herbs. At least r_c seems to have stopped sneezing for now.

success_outcomes.text: p_l continues the patrol without acknowledging r_c sneezing. Despite the circumstances, the fresh newleaf plants are bountiful for the group, and the patrol returns with an average collection of herbs.

p_l doesn't see r_c's running nose as a burden. To p_l, it's an opportunity. While it prevents r_c from finding herbs, it makes r_c the perfect collector of herbs with less pleasant smells. When the patrol comes across a patch of some particularly pungent-scented herbs at the root of a tree, r_c is sent to collect them.

fail_outcomes.text: The patrol continues their search for herbs, despite r_c's plight. Unfortunately, the group doesn’t get very far. r_c stumbles mid-sneeze, tripping over a particularly large tree root and tumbling forward, knocking over other cats in {PRONOUN/r_c/poss} wake.

log.cats_from: cat_from lost respect for cat_to after a sidetracked patrol.
